---
title: "Physicochemical characterization of red pitaya (Hylocereus sp.) peel flour using FT-IR, Raman, and EPR spectroscopy: Effects of γ-irradiation on its intrinsic properties"
date: 2026-08-01
author:
  - name: Rondán-Flores, Luz M.
  - name: Villavicencio, Anna L.C.H.
  - name: De Castro, Dione Pereira
  - name: Wetter, Niklaus Ursus
  - name: Rao, T.K. Gundu
  - name: Canaza, Edwar A.
  - name: Cano, Nilo F.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Spectrochimica Acta Part A: Molecular and Biomolecular Spectroscopy"
  volume: 356
  doi: "10.1016/j.saa.2026.127720"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Physicochemical characterization of red pitaya (Hylocereus sp.) peel flour using FT-IR, Raman, and EPR spectroscopy: Effects of γ-irradiation on its intrinsic properties</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
